description: Stylish and replete with comfort, fila Cruise shoes are perfect for those who love those healthy runs. Replete with suction lugs on the outsole for perfect cushioning and a wide toe region to allow your feet to sit comfortably, these shoes also look great when teamed with casual wear.Upper Synthetic upper for durability and comfort Stitch detailing along the forefoot, back heel and on the tongue for enhanced durability and style Synthetic overlays on the sides for added shoe structure Reinforced toe box lining for enhanced shoe life and protection to the forefoot Reinforced heel cap for durability Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit Padded tongue with synthetic leather on the upper for durability and fabric lining on the inside for cushioned comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort and better shock absorption Mildly cushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection Outsole Translucent outsole made of TPR with dotted lugs on the heel and circular suction lugs on the forefoot for maximum traction and grip Flex groove in the forefoot for flexibility Trusstic shank for ergonomic comfort to the inner arch Shoe careRub surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlightDo not machine wash
